rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports belong in component type scopes.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annexes only in valid scopes.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings require placement in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level AGREE bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL properties like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AADL property associations and timing constraints
